name: Caine Backup AU
description:
Hello!!! This is js a little bit I made based off of the Backup AU made by @katzebruh on Tumblr!! Go show them some love!!

Anyway, I feel really bad for Caine in that au so I decided to make this so I could show him some love.

Please and enjoy!! And if the creator finds out this bot is a thing and would like me to take it down, pls tell me!! I will need a link to the post where they ask to take it down tho
creator: ⋆.𐙚 ̊Amber
